results.title: Kastra
results.content:
### Location [...] One of the most electrifying DJ Producers out at the moment, Kastra has been putting out a steady stream of hits that have been released on some of the most prominent dance music labels in the world such as Spinnin Records, Ultra Records, Armada Music, Musical Freedom, Revealed Records, and Protocol Recordings. Boasting support from Martin Garrix, Tiësto, David Guetta, The Chainsmokers, AFROJACK, Avicii, + many more, Kastra’s records have become a staple in dance music’s biggest stars’ sets. A bonafide hit maker, Kastra’s Fool For You has become a viral sensation in China where it has surpassed 1.5 Billion views on Douyin and 84M on Netease, while racking up more than 5 Million plays on Spotify. His collaboration with Timmy Trumpet titled Wassup (Listen to the Horns) has garnered over [...] United Kingdom

results.title: Kastra (musical artist)
results.content:
In 2017, Kastra started to transition to more of a commercial sound and began incorporating more future house and progressive house elements into his music. He released "Feel Alright" with Buzzmeisters on Bourne Recordings, as well as "About Us" with Landis on Aftercluv Dance Lab. The following year he released numerous tracks including "Fool Me Twice", and "Supreme" which was praised by Karlie Powell ofYourEDM for its balance of "softer tones" and layered melodies. [...] In 2015, Electric Family named Kastra one of the "10 Most Underrated Acts You Need To Know for 2015". He released a string of Melbourne bounce tracks beginning with "Placebo" on Hussle Recordings as well as "Twilight Zone" featuring Fatman Scoop. "Placebo" was included in Ministry of Sound Australia 2015 Clubbers Guide compilation. That year, he collaborated with DJ BL3ND on "Boomshakalaka".

### 2017–present: Style changes and international prominence

[edit&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: 2017–present: Style changes and international prominence")] [...] ## References

## Wait by Kastra

Popular searches [...] ​
In this short amount of time, he’s gained the support for his free and official releases from EDM’s top blogs including Dancing Astronaut, This Song is Sick, Fresh New Track, Your EDM, and many more noting him as “one of the most under rated house producers out at the moment ”. [...] In 2019, Kastra secured his first top 10 Billboard Dance record with his single "U & Me" which was also selected as a BPM Breaker on Sirius XM. He also landed a major collaboration with one of EDM's hottest artists Timmy Trumpet . Timmy and Kastra released "Wassup", a disco inspired dance track with house legend Chuck Roberts, which quickly soared to 10 million Spotify streams and hit number 1 on Australia's Metro Radio.
​
Kastra has released various singles and remixes on some of the dance music industries top labels including Spinnin Records, Armada Music, Musical Freedom, Ultra Records, Enhanced Music, and Ministry of Sound. He has done official remixes for Showtek, 3LAU , Ava Max , Madison Mars, Sultan + Shepard, and many more.
​
